notes: Removes the unnecessary first-session Angular reload while retaining release-versioned browser assets
Renders expert Overview from the already loaded status immediately and fills secondary read-only panels in bounded background stages with at most two concurrent API calls
Caches external-IP and traffic-plan reads and extends invalidation-aware TTLs for dashboard, metrics, alerts and router information
Keeps both rollback tiers: the proven embedded 2026.07.14.2 release and a reversible previous-application backup; neither changes VPN configuration
Includes browser, BusyBox, cache-flow, safety, endpoint-scan and rollback regression checks
Does not change profile selection, XRay startup, Hysteria2, OAuth or routing logic
